title: Intense Russian Lamb Kebabs
description: A winey and shattering solo dinner dish featuring lamb leg, ferment jang, and raw friendly ingredients, inspired by Russian cuisine. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: lamb leg
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine, ferment jang, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated lamb, onion, and bell pepper onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
